TweetClaw

X Session Bridge for AI Agents

Bridge Status
Checking…
Capabilities
  • 🔗 Bind X browser session to local AI agents
  • 📖 Read home timeline, tweet details & search results
  • 👤 Fetch user profile information
  • ⚡ Execute actions — like, retweet, follow, post, reply
  • 🌐 Open, close and navigate X tabs on demand
  • 💎 Saves AI token costs vs. direct API scraping
WebSocket Port
Companion App Required
Visit our official website to download the required companion app.
